posts.text: When Alexis de Tocqueville arrived in New York in 1831, it was a small, low-slung city with pigs on the streets. But he was able to see past that to a vision of the future. How is that vision faring today? Find out on episode one of “Tocqueville Road Trip” https://www.economist.com/podcasts/2026/06/11/1-game-of-chance?taid=6a2e5f86c0a91f00013041f7&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter
posts.author: TheEconomist

posts.text: I have many more issues with Ilhan Omar being worth $30 million than Elon being worth a trillion.
posts.author: hkuppy
